chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-6797 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 28.4.2026 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General -------------------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
